name: pxpipe
description: Local proxy that cuts Claude Code token costs by rendering bulky context (tool results, old history, system prompt) as compressed PNG images
notes: pxpipe is a single GitHub repo (teamchong/pxpipe) with no docs site, so the only synced source is the raw upstream README.md. The topical docs/ files (setup, accuracy-caveats, library-api, savings-verification) are hand-curated from the README and FINDINGS.md; refresh them manually when the README changes.
